SEARCH
Package assignment01

Class DriversLicense

java.lang.Object
assignment01.DriversLicense
public class DriversLicense extends Object
The DriversLicense class demonstrates am Ontario driver's license. It stores personal, address, licence and date details. It also provides methods to expiry duration, compute age, issue days ad formatted licence reports.
Author:
Hiral Prajapati

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DriversLicense()
    Default Constructor that initializes the objects with sample values.

    constructor that assigns values for license class and restrictions.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    computeDaysSinceIssue()
    Calculates total number of days since the license was issued.
    int
    computeDaysToExpiry()
    License expiry is calculated as 5 years after issue date.
    int
    computeDriverAge()
    Calculates the age of the driver.
    double
    computeHeightInInches()
    Convert height from centimeters to inches.
    int
    computeYearsSinceIssue()
    Calculates total number of years since the license was issued.
